# Test every edge case in one file
Package-With-Dots.and_underscores==1.0
UPPERCASE-PACKAGE>=2.0
pkg-with-extras[extra1,extra2]
pkg; python_version>='3.8' and sys_platform=='win32'
pkg --only-binary :all: ; sys_platform=='linux'
git+https://github.com/org/pkg.git#egg=mypkg
pkg @ https://example.com/pkg-1.0.tar.gz
-r other.txt
-e .
# commented
